description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a symmetrical, rectangular footprint and a prominent hip roof in dark gray. The front facade features large, evenly spaced windows and a central entryway, flanked by a paved walkway and a row of small trees or shrubs on either side. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely finished in stucco or painted concrete, and the windows are arranged in neat, horizontal rows. The house sits on a broad, paved lot that extends to the sides and rear, providing ample space around the structure. The landscaping is minimal, with the most notable greenery being the aligned trees at the front. The overall design is simple and modern, with clean lines and a focus on symmetry.
description: A modern, two-story house with a hip roof, large front windows, and a paved entry flanked by small trees. The exterior is light-colored and the design is clean and symmetrical.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and two rows of small trees along the paved walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, plain side wall, and the row of trees extending from the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simple, windowless back wall and the paved lot surrounding the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the hip roof, plain wall, and the continuation of the paved area and trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a paved walkway, flanked by small trees, and a simple, unadorned door.
